name: Volumetric Fake + EM Field
description: God rays with mouse electromagnetic field distortion. Electric field bends light rays; magnetic field causes chromatic RGB separation. Click ripples spawn secondary light charges.

params.name: Light Intensity
params.description: Light source intensity and EM charge strength

params.name: EM Distortion
params.description: Electric field ray bending and dust density

params.name: Chromatic Split
params.description: Magnetic field RGB separation and scattering

params.name: Ripple Charge
params.description: Secondary charge strength from clicks and noise speed
